title: Refined Totem
description: This resourcepack enhances the totem by giving it a refined 3D model.
body:
![Totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4caf1924228cd9f9a591bd3215419cdfe44e24d.png)
[![Discord Server](https://img.shields.io/discord/1446530427337576541?style=for-the-badge&logo=Discord&logoColor=white&label=Discord&color=728ADA)](https://discord.gg/2P8kfceSmt) [![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/naoseiainda?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white&label=curseforge&color=F16436)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/naoseiainda) [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/5VgU3Cwn?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&label=Modrinth&color=1CD96A)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/refined-totem)
![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/899c0e364c509449cd21d46c78cd5a7775ff9951.png) This resource pack gives the Totem of Undying a refined 3D look, adding more depth and detail while keeping that vanilla feel (kinda). The inventory icons stay 2D by default, so it works nicely with other packs that tweak sprites. ![totem2](https://i.imgur.com/fv2l7eq.gif)
![Important](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6570fc1c8af37836ab6d9863e9b10a47862ff43.png)
Recommended Mods
Required Mods on 1.21.5 and below
